title: Connection Draining & Graceful Shutdown
description: Implement connection draining mechanisms to allow active requests to complete before server shutdown. Architect graceful shutdown procedures for zero-downtime deployments during backend rotations. Design strategies for managing active socket lifecycles in a distributed system.
objectives: Implement connection draining mechanisms to allow active requests to complete before server shutdown.
Architect graceful shutdown procedures for zero-downtime deployments during backend rotations.
Design strategies for managing active socket lifecycles in a distributed system.
